headline: Jim Cramer on Booking Holdings: “It’s Glenn Fogel, and He’s Going to Snap Right Back Here”
summary: Booking Holdings Inc. (NASDAQ:BKNG) is one of the stocks mentioned during the show, as we cover everything Jim Cramer said about the oversold market. A caller asked whether to buy the stock before or after the stock split. In response, Cramer said: Well, look, what matters here is the fundamentals. Now, the quarter last time… […]

headline: Booking Holdings Inc. (BKNG) Turns to AI to Accelerate Users’ Experience and Growth
summary: Booking Holdings Inc. (NASDAQ:BKNG) is one of Harvard University’s top AI stock picks. On March 4 at the Morgan Stanley Technology, Media & Telecom Conference 2026, Booking Holdings Inc. (NASDAQ:BKNG) reiterated its ambitious growth targets and the transformative role of generative AI. The company is targeting 8% top-line growth, which should result in 15% earnings-per-share […]

headline: 3 Market Segments I'm Targeting When Iran War Ends
summary: IWM gives broad small-cap exposure hit by oil-price shocks. XLY stands to benefit when oil prices drop, as will JETS. Read here for more analysis.

headline: Opinion: As Trump eyes Cuba, my trips there a decade ago remind me how different things were
summary: Trump has threatened a 'friendly takeover' of Cuba after cutting it off from Venezuela's oil. CNBC's Justin Solomon reflects how different things used to be.
